judge_reason: Description A describes a photograph of a goldfinch on a pine branch on a card, while Description B describes a sketch of a yellow bird on a branch, and B adds two distinct stamps not mentioned by A, indicating completely different visual content.
original_image_tags: A small, off-white card with a color illustration of a goldfinch bird perched on a pine branch. The card has handwritten text in blue ink and is taped onto a larger, beige folder page with clear tape. The page itself has some stains and hole punches at the top.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila archive folder page with a taped-in handwritten note on white paper, decorated with a colored drawing of a pine branch and small bird, plus visible handwritten address/date text and FBI-style red and blue stamp markings on the folder.*
